caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a striped blue and white shirt and black over-the-ear headphones, speaks while facing the camera. She is positioned in an indoor setting with a light-colored wall behind her and a yellowish curtain to her left. To her right, a neutral-toned furniture piece is partially visible. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom-left corner of each frame. As the sequence progresses, her facial expressions change slightly as she talks, with her mouth opening and closing to form words. Her head remains mostly stationary, though there are subtle shifts in her gaze and posture. The background and her clothing remain constant throughout the clip, with no other people or objects entering the frame.
